title: calophyllum dispar
intro: Calophyllum dispar is a species of plant in the family Calophyllaceae, commonly known as the Beeswax tree due to its unique latex that resembles beeswax. The plant has been found to possess medicinal properties, particularly in its ability to exhibit anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant activities. The health benefits of Calophyllum dispar include its potential to treat various conditions such as wounds, skin infections, and digestive issues, as well as its ability to act as an antiseptic and anti-fungal agent. Calophyllum dispar can be prepared into herbal preparations such as oils, extracts, and ointments, which can be used topically or taken internally under the guidance of a healthcare professional.
